blocking_checks.check: Source text inventory maps each dataset file to one work and author.
Rights review table contains required source-level fields.
Base works are treated only as rights-reviewed public-domain candidates under Turkish death+70 rule.
Modern publisher paratext and edition-specific material exclusion policy is documented.
Full dataset files are not included in this patch.
Full dataset must be validated under the two-regime validator before any Hugging Face dataset release.
Final Hugging Face README/dataset card metadata must be generated from the exact release package.
Final data license for full dataset package must be confirmed after source edition review.
No private prompts, secret tokens, local absolute paths, or local report artifacts are included.

final_note: The GitHub public-preview repository does not contain the full dataset; the final Hugging Face dataset package is prepared separately in the upload-ready bundle.
